# registry_scm_providers (Data Source)

Lists all SCM provider integrations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "registry_scm_providers" "all" {}

output "scm_names" {
  value = [for s in data.registry_scm_providers.all.scm_providers : s.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `scm_providers` (Attributes List) List of SCM providers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scm_providers))

<a id="nestedatt--scm_providers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scm_providers`

Read-Only:

- `base_url` (String) Base URL for self-hosted instances.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) UUID.
- `name` (String) Display name.
- `oauth_status` (String) OAuth token status.
- `type` (String) SCM type.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
